mnemonics: The 3 V's of Big Data: Volume, Velocity, Variety
keyPoints: The massive scale of data (Volume) that is too large for traditional databases to handle.
The high speed (Velocity) at which data is generated and needs to be processed.
The diverse types and sources of data (Variety), including structured, unstructured, and semi-structured data.
commonMistakes: Confusing 'Big Data' with just a large volume of data, ignoring the critical aspects of Velocity and Variety.
Assuming traditional data processing tools (like a single relational database) are sufficient for handling big data challenges.
